lambo.title: Lambo
lambo.lyrics:
**Tilskuere synger**
Se der står en fyllehund, mine herrer lambo.
Sett nu flasken for din munn, mine herrer lambo.
Se hvordan den dråpen vanker ned ad halsen på den dranker
**:/:** Lambo, lambo, mine herrer lambo **:/:**
*(Synges til dranker har drukket opp)*

**Dranker synger**
Jeg mitt glass utdrukket har, mine herrer lambo.
Se der fins ei dråpen kvar, mine herrer lambo.
Som bevis der på jeg vender, flasken på dens rette ende.
*(Pause mens drankeren snur glass/flaske over hodet)*

**Tilskuere synger**
Lambo, lambo, mine herrer lambo
Han/hun kunne kunsten han/hun var et jævla fyllesvin.
Så går vi til nestemann og ser hva han/hun formår.
*(Alternativt: Så går vi til baren og sjenker oss en tår.)*

lay-all-your-love-on-me.title: Lay All Your Love On Me
lay-all-your-love-on-me.lyrics:
**Fadderbarn**
I wasn't jealous before we met. Now every woman I see is a potential threat
**Faddere**
And I'm possessive, it isnt nice. You've heard me saying that smoking was my only vice
**Alle**
But now it isn't true. Now everything is new
**Blir full av en øl**
And all I've learned has overturned I beg of you
**Har gått på en smell**
Don't go wasting your emotion. Lay all your love on me
**Har brunt hår**
It was like shooting a sitting duck. A little small talk, a smile, and baby, I was stuck
**Er blond**
I still don't know what you've done with me. A grown-up woman should never fall so easily
**Fra Bærum**
I feel a kind of fear. When I don't have you near
**Fra vestlandet**
Unsatisfied, I skip my pride. I beg you, dear
**Er singel**
Don't go wasting your emotion. Lay all your love on me
**Har blitt kastet ut av et utested**
Don't go sharing your devotion. Lay all your love on me
**Alle som snuser**
I've had a few little love affairs. They didn't last very long and they've been pretty scarce
**Alle 05 og 04**
I used to think that was sensible. It makes the truth even more incomprehensible
**Har tatt en powerpuke**
'Cause everything is new. And everything is you
**Har et abacrush**
And all I've learned has overturned. What can I do?
**Har tatovering**
Don't go wasting your emotion. Lay all your love on me
**Har hatt friår**
Don't go sharing your devotion. Lay all your love on me
**Fra Trøndelag**
Don't go wasting your emotion. Lay all your love on me
**Har blitt tatt på fersken av foreldrene sine**
Don't go sharing your devotion. Lay all your love on me
**ALLE**
Don't go wasting your emotion. Lay all your love on me

forever-alone.title: Forever Alone
forever-alone.lyrics:
**Faddere**
No one can say I didn't try
**Alle**
Tried everything to make you feel what I feel
**Går Datateknologi**
Well, I guess I pushed to hard
**Går Cyber**
And now you're slipping away
**Har hatt kjæreste**
Feels like my love for you
**Jukset på en prøve**
Is stopping you from being you
**De som har hatt friår**
You shine best without me
**Fadderbarn**
Like all the ones I had before
**ALLE!**
I am forever alone
**Har vært i milla**
Home alone eating sushi for two
**Har grått i 2025**
Home alone and I'm waiting for someone who never shows up
**Er hyped for i dag**
Ooh, and I'm lonely, I'm angry I'm tired
**Spydd på fest**
You're only giving med drips of your love
**Har blitt blokket på snap av noen før**
Appointments, you've been breaking them all
**Har blokket noen før**
It's like a never ending story
**Har hatt blackout**
I give, and you take, and I give, and you take
**Har på seg undertøy**
Feels like my love for you
**Alle**
Is stopping you from being you
**Gått på folkehøyskole**
You shine best without me
**Alle**
Like all the ones I had before
**Er singel**
I am forever alone
**Fått 2 på en prøve**
When I held your hand you were sincere
**Ditchet skolen**
But did you ever think about me when I wasn't near you
**Drikker noe annet enn øl**
Why would you ever put me first?
**Har vært på tinderdate**
You are second to none
**Har onanert**
I wanted to leave, I tried to find someone new
**Studerer**
But I always end up still wanting you
**Tror de blir fulle i kveld**
Why do I do this to myself?
**Hoppet i fallskjerm**
Feels like my love for you
**Har farget håret før**
Is stopping you from being you
**Blitt tatt med fake leg**
You shine best without me
**Har et crush**
Like all the ones I had before
**Blir fort forelsket**
I am forever alone
**Alle**
When I'm with you, you tell me you love me
**Skulle tatt en tur til specsavers**
When you're not I don't even exist
**Hadde solgt bilde av føttene for 100 kr**
If I ask you if you want to hang with me
**Har dusjet med en annen**
You got a thousand excuses rehearsed
**Alle med blondt hår**
But when you're drunk and got no place to hide
**Alle som er single**
Who's the one you always call?
**Alle som skal bli fulle i dag**
Feels like my love for you
**Hadde gått på date med en sugerdaddy for 10 000 kr**
Is stopping you from being you
**Fadderbarn**
You shine best without me
**Alle**
Like all the ones I had before
**Kommet hjem i 06 tiden**
I am forever alone
**Har flyttet ut**
My love for you
**Drikker sprit i dag**
Is stopping you from being you
**Har vært på utested**
You shine best without me
**Fadderbarn**
Like all the ones I had before
**ALLE**
I am forever alone
